title: Pet Inventory
description: This lightweight mod adds personal inventories to tamed pets.
body:
This light mod adds personal inventories to tamed pets. Each pet, be it a wolf, cat or parrot, will have its own inventory of 27 slots (equivalent to a chest). Only the owner has access to the pet's inventory. After the death of the pet, the contents of its inventory will drop.

**MANDATORY**: for the mod to work, additionally install mod: Cardinal Components
